summary: iOS 🟥 HSFWCH-10257 | FALCON 🎧 Custom EQ settings are not saved
scenario: Custom EQ slider positions reset to default after saving and reopening EQ settings on Device Settings > Sound > Tune
description_clean: Custom EQ settings are not saved. Steps: Pair device with the app, go to Device Settings > Sound > Tune, select Custom, change sliders, tap Save EQ, then close and reopen EQ settings. Observed: Custom EQ is selected but all sliders reset to default (middle) position. Expected: Changes to custom EQ sliders should be properly saved.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure your Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected via the Home screen.
3. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
6. Adjust one or more EQ sliders (e.g., move a slider up or down from the default center position).
7. Tap the "Save EQ" button to save the custom settings.
8. Close the Equalizer settings screen (e.g., tap back or exit).
9. Re-open the Equalizer settings by navigating again to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
10. Observe the state of the EQ sliders and the selected preset.
expected: The Custom EQ preset remains selected, and all EQ sliders retain the positions that were saved in step 7.
actual: The Custom EQ preset is selected, but all EQ sliders have reset to the default (center/middle) position, losing the previously saved adjustments.
